title: Package money-source proof queue routing evidence
objective: Convert the existing 16-row local money-source proof queue and blocked browser-read-only service request into an auditable local routing packet without browser, account, API, public, wallet, payment, current-source verification, or real-money action.
allowed_actions: read local service-request packet as blocked-gate context

approval_requirements.scope: Not required for this local packaging packet; required before reading public opportunity directories or current-verifying URLs.
Not required for this local packaging packet; required before comments, claims, applications, submissions, listings, outreach, or public posts.
Not required for this local packaging packet; required before accounts, payouts, tax/KYC, seller setup, or paid work commitments.

context_artifacts.purpose: 16-row queue of candidate money-source routes, owner lanes, gates, planned proof paths, and blocked-until states.
Human-readable local dry-run explaining source routing and gate classes.
Blocked browser-read-only review packet; context only.

success_criteria: all adapters prepare or materialize local-only artifact plans without external execution
result files are written and linked from aggregate reports
money-source browser-read-only service request remains needs_review
